title: Lease Buyback Scheme
text:
Lease Buyback Scheme - SupportGoWhere
Lease Buyback Scheme
Share link
Provides seniors with a steady stream of retirement income when they sell the tail-end of their flat lease to HDB while they continue to occupy the flat for the lease they retained.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive monthly payouts and continue to stay in the flat for the lease retained when you sell the tail-end lease of your flat to HDB
Application takes about 3 months to complete from the date of interest to proceed
Make an e-appointment with HDB for a preliminary financial counselling session
Collapse all sections
About this support

Sell part of your flat's lease to HDB and choose to retain the length of lease based on the age of the youngest owner

Proceeds from selling part of your flat's lease will be used to top up your CPF Retirement Account (RA), and you can use your CPF RA to join CPF LIFE, which will provide you with a monthly income for life

Who is this for?

At least 1 owner must be a Singapore Citizen

All owners 65 years and older

Monthly household income not more than $14,000

No concurrent ownership of second property, and no more than 1 non-residential private property

All owners have been living in the flat for at least 5 years, or 10 years for Plus or Prime flats

Flat has at least 20 years of lease to sell to HDB

How to apply?

Learn about your eligibility for this scheme (and other housing monetisation options) and the estimated monthly payouts you can receive via HDB’s 'Check Housing Monetisation Option' e-Service

To apply:

Make an appointment with an HDB Branch office

Log in with or without Singpass

Click on 'Make a new appointment'

Select 'Lease Buyback Scheme'

Then 'Enquiry'

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Branch Service Line: 6225-5432

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 16 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
